summary: Comprehensive testing of Trazabilidad KPIs features. All backend APIs pass (12/12 tests). Frontend features verified: Salud column in Registros, KPIs Calidad tab, Paralizados tab, Notifications bell with filtering, Sidebar sections. All features working correctly.
features_verified: GET /api/registros returns mermas_total, fallados_total, arreglos_vencidos fields - PASS
GET /api/reportes/trazabilidad-kpis returns KPIs with all required fields - PASS
GET /api/reportes-produccion/alertas-produccion includes servicio_id in each alerta - PASS
Salud column visible in Registros table with OK/warning/danger icons - PASS
KPIs Calidad tab visible in Lotes & Trazabilidad page - PASS
KPIs show: Mermas 52, Fallados 23, Arreglos 2, Vencidos 1 - PASS
Paralizados tab visible in Seguimiento de Produccion - PASS
Paralizados shows: 1 activa, 1 resuelta, 4.5 dias promedio - PASS
Sidebar shows INVENTARIO FIFO and MAESTROS sections for admin user - PASS
Notifications bell shows 7 alerts (1 vencidos, 6 criticos, 1 paralizados) - PASS
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo data (13 registros, 52 mermas, 23 fallados, 2 arreglos)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Trazabilidad KPIs features are working correctly. Backend endpoints tested: /api/registros (with salud fields), /api/reportes/trazabilidad-kpis, /api/reportes-produccion/alertas-produccion (with servicio_id), /api/export/mermas|fallados|arreglos. Frontend verified: Salud column in Registros table, KPIs Calidad tab in Lotes & Trazabilidad, Paralizados tab in Seguimiento, Notifications bell filtering, Sidebar sections. Admin user (eduard) has full access to all sections.
